sources.title: Source title
sources.notes: Describe what this source claims, without treating the claim as proven.

sources.title: Secondary report title
sources.notes: Describe the reporting posture and whether it relies on named, unnamed, primary, or secondary sources.

sources.title: Screenshot description
sources.notes: Describe visible claim posture and what would be required to verify the original source.

missing_primary_records.description: Directive text, metadata, authority basis, or order record required to confirm authority posture.
Technical report, model-capability record, or mitigation record required to confirm technical risk posture.
Appeal, expiration, reassessment, or independent review mechanism required to evaluate admissibility over time.

source_boundary_rule: A public source may establish that a claim was made. It does not by itself establish that the underlying claim is true, complete, lawful, or admissible.
